title: Object-Oriented Programming with C++ (JNTUK R20)
description: JNTUK R20 Year 2 Sem 1 — Complete OOP with C++ covering classes, inheritance, polymorphism, templates, STL, and file I/O aligned to JNTUK B.Tech CSE R20 syllabus.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: Introduction and overview of Object-Oriented Programming with C++ (JNTUK R20)

modules.title: Core Lectures
modules.description: All lectures and concept pages for this course

pages.title: Introduction to C++: History, Features, Differences from C
Classes and Objects: Access Specifiers, Member Functions, Constructors
Constructors and Destructors: Default, Parameterized, Copy, Destructor Order
Inheritance in C++: Single, Multiple, Multilevel, Hierarchical, Hybrid
Polymorphism: Function Overloading, Operator Overloading, Virtual Functions
Abstract Classes and Pure Virtual Functions, Interfaces in C++
Templates: Function Templates, Class Templates, Generic Programming
Standard Template Library (STL): Containers, Iterators, Algorithms
Exception Handling in C++: try-catch-throw, Custom Exceptions
File I/O in C++: fstream, ifstream, ofstream, Binary Files
Smart Pointers and RAII: unique_ptr, shared_ptr, Memory Management
